reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the partner Harrison Newey had for his ADAC Formula 4 debut.
2. Determine who that partner is the son of and return the parents as stated.
original_final_question: Harrison Newey made his ADAC Formula 4 debut with a partner who is the son of who? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Who partnered Harrison Newey for his ADAC Formula 4 debut? Evidence: Harrison Newey: He made his ADAC Formula 4 debut in 2015, partnering Mick Schumacher, son of world champion driver Michael Schumacher, at Van Amersfoort Racing. -> Mick Schumacher

Node 2: Who are Mick Schumacher's parents? Evidence: Mick Schumacher: He is the son of Corinna and seven-time Formula One World Champion Michael Schumacher, nephew of former Formula One driver Ralf Schumacher, and stepnephew of Sebastian Stahl. -> Corinna and seven-time Formula One World Champion Michael Schumacher
Final answer: Corinna and seven-time Formula One World Champion Michael Schumacher
